debug_info.goal:
S : Set ℝ
h₁ : S = {x | (¬∃ n ∈ Finset.Icc 1 70, x = ↑n) ∧ 5 / 4 ≤ ∑ k ∈ Finset.Icc 1 70, ↑k / (x - ↑k)}
⊢ ∃ l r n,
    (∀ k < n, l k < r k) ∧
      (∀ k < n - 1, r k < l (k + 1)) ∧
        ∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (r k - l k) = 1988 ∧ S = ⋃ k ∈ Finset.range n, Set.Ioc (l k) (r k)

failed_attempts:
-- Use the helper lemmas to construct the intervals
  obtain ⟨rr, hrr_lb, hrr_ub, hrr_f, hrr_S⟩ := IMO1988P4.S_eq_union S h₁
  -- Provide witnesses: n = 70, l(k) = k+1, r(k) = rr(k)
  refine ⟨fun k => (k : ℝ) + 1, fun k => if h : k < 70 then rr ⟨k, h⟩ else 0, 70, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · -- Disjoint: l(k) < r(k)
    intro k hk; simp [hk]; exact hrr_lb ⟨k, hk⟩
  · -- Ordered: r(k) < l(k+1)
    intro k hk
    simp [show k < 70 from by omega, show k + 1 < 70 from by omega]
    have := hrr_ub ⟨k, by omega⟩ (by simp; omega)
    push_cast at this ⊢; linarith
  · -- Sum = 1988
    sorry
  · -- S = union
    sorry
